comments.author: github-actions[bot]
comments.body:
<!-- test-coverage-review -->

## ✅ Test Coverage Review

**Last updated:** 2026-02-22 16:13:46 PT

No violations found. All source modifications have corresponding tests.

<details>
<summary>Details</summary>

### Patterns Checked
✅ All source file modifications have tests
✅ No untested new source files
✅ No test deletions without corresponding source removal

### Files Reviewed
- `packages/erk-shared/src/erk_shared/plan_store/github.py`: Modified with 119-line test coverage
- `packages/erk-shared/tests/unit/plan_store/test_update_plan_content.py`: New test file (2 tests)
- `tests/commands/one_shot/test_one_shot_dispatch.py`: Modified with 2 new tests

### Summary
This PR hardens plan comment resilience by changing the behavior of `update_plan_content` from raising an error when no plan comment exists to creating one and updating the issue body. The changes are fully tested:

- **test_update_plan_content_creates_comment_when_none_exist** validates the core new behavior (creating comment + updating issue body)
- **test_update_plan_content_first_comment_fallback_still_works** validates backward compatibility with existing fallback logic
- **test_dispatch_fails_on_full_skeleton_failure** and **test_dispatch_fails_on_partial_skeleton_failure** test error handling at the integration level

---

### Activity Log
- **2026-02-22 16:13:46 PT**: All source modifications have test coverage. No violations.

</details>
